to: impose an activity condition on an individual who is a child

conditions.text: the individual is a parent of the child concerned
the order is an excepted order (within the meaning given by section 11B(4))

to: be varied so as to impose an activity condition

conditions.text: the order is an excepted order (within the meaning given by section 11B(4))

to: impose an activity condition on an individual

conditions.text: the individual is habitually resident in England and Wales
the individual subject to the condition ceases to be habitually resident in England and Wales
